case_title: MARK COLLINS VS. YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC et al

docket_entries.description: DEFENDANT(S)-YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC. REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR BELVIN KENT SMITH.

PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE SEP-27-2007.

REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR OCT-15-2007 AFTER HEARING; NO SETTLEMENT REACHED.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
